subject: Gine, a female Saiyan figure in Saiyan-style combat attire, waving with one hand raised in a cheerful greeting gesture, monkey tail visible
description: A female humanoid figure with short dark hair stands in a friendly, welcoming pose with one hand raised in a wave. She wears a Saiyan-style bodysuit in warm earth tones — orange and brown — with a visible monkey tail curving at her side. Her expression is cheerful and open. The background is warm and diffuse with soft lighting. The composition is a mid-shot portrait, the figure occupying the center of the frame against a softly lit warm background.
foreground: Female Saiyan figure in bodysuit, short dark hair, monkey tail, waving hand raised
background: Soft warm diffuse light, indistinct warm background
